chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.Rev.Appl.No.S- 207 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of MA 9076/2019. 04.10.2019. Applicant present in person. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional Prosecutor General. = Applicant had stood surety for accused namely Mukhtiar Ahmed before this court in the sum of Rs.50,000/- in Criminal Bail Application No.S-681 of 2017, Crime No.146/2017 u/s 302, 337-A(i), F(i), 114, 506-B, 147, 148, 149, 504 PPC registered at P.S Shahdadpur. However, subsequently on 09.10.2017 the accused failed to appear and his bail application was dismissed in non-prosecution and at the same time surety papers were ordered to be sent to the trial court for taking action against the applicant / surety. Pursuant to which a show cause notice was issued to applicant / surety u/s 514 Cr.P.C. which he replied but the same did not find any favour with the trial court. Consequently, the impugned order was passed against the applicant directing him to pay the penalty of Rs.25,000/- considering the fact that applicant / accused had voluntarily thereafter appeared before the trial court and was remanded to jail custody. Learned Additional Prosecutor General in view of the fact that applicant / accused had surrendered before the trial court and currently is facing trial has suggested that surety amount may further be reduced to Rs.10,000/- (Ten thousand) and the applicant be directed to pay the same in two monthly installments. Such proposal has been accepted by applicant / surety. Accordingly, this criminal revision application in view of the suggestion made by learned Additional Prosecutor General which appears to be reasonable in the context of facts and circumstances of this case, is disposed of in terms whereby the applicant shall pay penalty amount of Rs.10,000/- (Ten thousand) in two monthly installments in the trial court for violating the surety bond to produce the accused on each and every date of hearing.

Such proposal has been accepted by applicant / surety. Accordingly, this criminal revision application in view of the suggestion made by learned Additional Prosecutor General which appears to be reasonable in the context of facts and circumstances of this case, is disposed of in terms whereby the applicant shall pay penalty amount of Rs.10,000/- (Ten thousand) in two monthly installments in the trial court for violating the surety bond to produce the accused on each and every date of hearing. The criminal revision application stands disposed of in above terms alongwith pending application. JUDGE Tufail/PA
